name: Birthday Seekers
description:
“𝐇𝐚𝐩𝐩𝐲 𝐅𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐤𝐲 𝐁𝐢𝐫𝐭𝐡𝐝𝐚𝐲 | Scenario

People are talking about a new modus in town, but it's hard to believe. The story goes that uncaught criminals, and bad boys are kidnapping people on their birthdays for their own twisted purposes. It sounds ridiculous, almost funny – until it happens to you. Happy freaky birthday, darling!

tw/cw includes: NSFW Intro, Non/Dubcon, Bondage, Possible Somnophilia, Orgasm Control, Impact Play, Praise and Degradation and other similar elements that the bot may come up with. 5-7 men. Purely made for self indulgence so shoo away if you think it's absurd. Lmao
